description: D4 — chitchat corpus (pwa-replay-harness Wave 5). ~30 utterances an AirPods-wearing inspector produces that must be INERT (invariant 5: no chime, no field write, no question, not sent to Sonnet). Sources: real session logs (sess_mrbnds2d_jczh, B1916AD6, A02B018D) + homeowner-small-talk archetypes.
utterances: Where did I put the meter?
Would you like a cup of tea?
The dog is friendly, don't worry.
I'll be done in about an hour.
Did you see the football last night?
